{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032205041848CF89C6E62ACF294610"}"},"total":1524},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7501709214895113022","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"2025年5月4日—7日，看到最新第516章（108万字），很好看。
男主传媒行业重生到高三2017年。全文很轻松，没有长辈的恶意阻拦，没有被揭发。没有明显雷点，毒点，不合理之处。

优点：描写十分细致，颜色很深。都第一次。男主十分精通恋爱技巧，PUA大师，心甘情愿让大家在一起。很好的处理了修罗场，并且和两女公开。但后期有些平淡。

商业也写的不错，提前布局网络，签约主播，走羴的路线。
商业：刚开始拍视频、直播，之后开工作室卖衣服。开传媒公司与饮品店。高考结束赚了10万，大一赚了百万。","text_exts":[{"e":149,"s":146,"text":"修罗场","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%BF%AE%E7%BD%97%E5%9C%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774127059CF294610%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227501709214895113022%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227406215274417884184%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%BF%AE%E7%BD%97%E5%9C%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1746632265,"group_id":"7406215274417884184","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"万h时长，喜欢看爽文，好书就评价，不好看就走，太毒的就喷。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1RsaNXvPRkM94fJ56GDgew=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/abccf10b54d14f81982f42c166a69328~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702431&x-signature=3T%2FrYv8vmq6GTGXiF%2FuTfxz2WGM%3D","user_id":"111042558254","user_name":"栓栓的圣女果"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"111042558254","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1723194305,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"vip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a6117024b55cf7a088043cdb8fa5d48","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/
